commands.review_summary:
The PR changes group-policy resolution so explicit `groupPolicy: "open"` keeps `groups` entries as per-group overrides, adds resolver tests, updates group/security docs, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +59, Docs +2. Total +67 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main sets `allowlistEnabled` whenever `groups` is non-empty, so an unlisted group under explicit `groupPolicy: "open"` is denied despite docs saying open bypasses group allowlists. I did not run the reproduction script because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow mechanical repair remains: align the remaining Telegram docs and refresh the dirty branch, while leaving the final access-boundary acceptance to maintainers.

target.title: fix(channels): keep groupPolicy=open loose when groups dict has per-group overrides
